channel.title: BCD-watch: Changes Report (weekly)
channel.description: A feed that summarizes changes to BCD weekly

item.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon Feb 16 2026
item.description: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
item.content:encoded:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 9 February 2026 through Monday, 16 February 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +44, -0

Support increases (44)

API

  1. api ➞ CustomElementRegistry ➞ CustomElementRegistry
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ CustomElementRegistry ➞ initialize
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ Document ➞ customElementRegistry
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ Element ➞ customElementRegistry
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ HTMLTemplateElement ➞ shadowRootCustomElementRegistry
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ NavigationPrecommitController ➞ addHandler
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ ShadowRoot ➞ customElementRegistry
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ AnimationTrigger
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  9. api ➞ GPUSupportedLimits ➞ maxStorageBuffersInFragmentStage
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  10. api ➞ GPUSupportedLimits ➞ maxStorageBuffersInVertexStage
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  11. api ➞ GPUSupportedLimits ➞ maxStorageTexturesInFragmentStage
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  12. api ➞ GPUSupportedLimits ➞ maxStorageTexturesInVertexStage
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  13. api ➞ GPUTexture ➞ textureBindingViewDimension
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ position-visibility ➞ anchors-valid
    Added to Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ text-indent ➞ each-line
    Added to Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ text-indent ➞ hanging
    Added to Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. css ➞ types ➞ basic-shape ➞ shape
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. css ➞ properties ➞ animation-trigger
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  6. css ➞ properties ➞ animation-trigger ➞ none
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  7. css ➞ properties ➞ overflow ➞ replaced_elements
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  8. css ➞ properties ➞ overflow-x ➞ replaced_elements
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  9. css ➞ properties ➞ overflow-y ➞ replaced_elements
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  10. css ➞ properties ➞ timeline-trigger
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  11. css ➞ properties ➞ timeline-trigger ➞ auto
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  12. css ➞ properties ➞ timeline-trigger ➞ none
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  13. css ➞ properties ➞ timeline-trigger ➞ normal
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  14. css ➞ properties ➞ timeline-trigger-name
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  15. css ➞ properties ➞ timeline-trigger-name ➞ none
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  16. css ➞ properties ➞ timeline-trigger-source
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  17. css ➞ properties ➞ timeline-trigger-source ➞ auto
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  18. css ➞ properties ➞ timeline-trigger-source ➞ none
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  19. css ➞ properties ➞ trigger-scope
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  20. css ➞ properties ➞ trigger-scope ➞ all
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  21. css ➞ properties ➞ trigger-scope ➞ none
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

HTTP

  1. http ➞ headers ➞ Accept-Encoding ➞ zstd
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. http ➞ headers ➞ Content-Encoding ➞ zstd
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines

JAVASCRIPT

  1. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ Iterator ➞ concat
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines

WEBASSEMBLY

  1. webassembly ➞ api ➞ Memory ➞ toFixedLengthBuffer
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. webassembly ➞ api ➞ Memory ➞ toResizableBuffer
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines

WEBDRIVER

  1. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ userAgentClientHints
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  2. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ userAgentClientHints ➞ setClientHintsOverride
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  3. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ userAgentClientHints ➞ setClientHintsOverride ➞ clientHints_parameter
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  4. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ userAgentClientHints ➞ setClientHintsOverride ➞ contexts_parameter
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  5. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ userAgentClientHints ➞ setClientHintsOverride ➞ userContexts_parameter
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 201

Show all 201 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (86)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Friday, 6 February 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

API

  1. api ➞ Clipboard ➞ clipboardchange_event
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ CrashReportContext
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ CrashReportContext ➞ delete
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ CrashReportContext ➞ initialize
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ CrashReportContext ➞ set
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ autolocate
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  9. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ error
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  10. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ initialPermissionStatus
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  11. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ invalidReason
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  12. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ isValid
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  13. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ location_event
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  14. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ permissionStatus
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  15. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ position
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  16. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ promptaction_event
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  17. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ promptdismiss_event
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  18. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ validationstatuschange_event
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  19. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ watch
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  20. api ➞ Window ➞ crashReport
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ at-rules ➞ container ➞ scroll-state_queries ➞ scrolled
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ at-rules ➞ media ➞ scan
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ background ➞ x-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  4. css ➞ properties ➞ background ➞ x-start
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  5. css ➞ properties ➞ background ➞ y-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  6. css ➞ properties ➞ background ➞ y-start
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  7. css ➞ properties ➞ background-position ➞ x-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  8. css ➞ properties ➞ background-position ➞ x-start
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  9. css ➞ properties ➞ background-position ➞ y-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  10. css ➞ properties ➞ background-position ➞ y-start
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  11. css ➞ properties ➞ background-position-x ➞ x-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  12. css ➞ properties ➞ background-position-x ➞ x-start
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  13. css ➞ properties ➞ background-position-y ➞ y-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  14. css ➞ properties ➞ background-position-y ➞ y-start
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  15. css ➞ properties ➞ mask ➞ x-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  16. css ➞ properties ➞ mask ➞ x-start
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  17. css ➞ properties ➞ mask ➞ y-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  18. css ➞ properties ➞ mask ➞ y-start
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  19. css ➞ properties ➞ mask-position ➞ x-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  20. css ➞ properties ➞ mask-position ➞ x-start
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  21. css ➞ properties ➞ mask-position ➞ y-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  22. css ➞ properties ➞ mask-position ➞ y-start
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  23. css ➞ properties ➞ object-position ➞ x-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  24. css ➞ properties ➞ object-position ➞ x-start
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  25. css ➞ properties ➞ object-position ➞ y-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  26. css ➞ properties ➞ object-position ➞ y-start
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  27. css ➞ properties ➞ offset ➞ x-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  28. css ➞ properties ➞ offset ➞ x-start
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  29. css ➞ properties ➞ offset ➞ y-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  30. css ➞ properties ➞ offset ➞ y-start
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  31. css ➞ properties ➞ offset-anchor ➞ x-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  32. css ➞ properties ➞ offset-anchor ➞ x-start
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  33. css ➞ properties ➞ offset-anchor ➞ y-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  34. css ➞ properties ➞ offset-anchor ➞ y-start
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  35. css ➞ properties ➞ offset-position ➞ x-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  36. css ➞ properties ➞ offset-position ➞ x-start
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  37. css ➞ properties ➞ offset-position ➞ y-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  38. css ➞ properties ➞ offset-position ➞ y-start
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  39. css ➞ properties ➞ perspective-origin ➞ x-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  40. css ➞ properties ➞ perspective-origin ➞ x-start
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  41. css ➞ properties ➞ perspective-origin ➞ y-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  42. css ➞ properties ➞ perspective-origin ➞ y-start
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines

HTML

  1. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist ➞ input_type_color
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist ➞ input_type_date
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  3. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist ➞ input_type_email
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist ➞ input_type_number
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist ➞ input_type_range
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  6. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist ➞ input_type_search
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  7. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist ➞ input_type_tel
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  8. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist ➞ input_type_text
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  9. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist ➞ input_type_time
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  10. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist ➞ input_type_url
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  11. html ➞ elements ➞ geolocation
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  12. html ➞ elements ➞ geolocation ➞ autolocate
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  13. html ➞ elements ➞ geolocation ➞ watch
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  14. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_color ➞ list
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  15. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_date ➞ list
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  16. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_email ➞ list
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  17. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_number ➞ list
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  18. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_range ➞ list
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  19. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_search ➞ list
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  20. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_tel ➞ list
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  21. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_text ➞ list
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  22. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_time ➞ list
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  23. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_url ➞ list
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

WEBEXTENSIONS

  1. webextensions ➞ api ➞ permissions ➞ Permissions ➞ data_collection
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

New entries (114)

The entries in this section were not found in BCD on Friday, 6 February 2026, but are now present. These usually do not have any support information attached to them, and often have no corresponding MDN page. Sometimes, entries that appear here also appear in the next section (“Removed BCD entries”) because of a Working Group deciding on a rename.

API

  1. api ➞ AnimationTrigger
  2. api ➞ Clipboard ➞ clipboardchange_event
  3. api ➞ CrashReportContext
  4. api ➞ CrashReportContext ➞ delete
  5. api ➞ CrashReportContext ➞ initialize
  6. api ➞ CrashReportContext ➞ set
  7. api ➞ GPUSupportedLimits ➞ maxStorageBuffersInFragmentStage
  8. api ➞ GPUSupportedLimits ➞ maxStorageBuffersInVertexStage
  9. api ➞ GPUSupportedLimits ➞ maxStorageTexturesInFragmentStage
  10. api ➞ GPUSupportedLimits ➞ maxStorageTexturesInVertexStage
  11. api ➞ GPUTexture ➞ textureBindingViewDimension
  12. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement
  13. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement
  14. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ autolocate
  15. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ error
  16. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ initialPermissionStatus
  17. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ invalidReason
  18. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ isValid
  19. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ location_event
  20. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ permissionStatus
  21. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ position
  22. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ promptaction_event
  23. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ promptdismiss_event
  24. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ validationstatuschange_event
  25. api ➞ HTMLGeolocationElement ➞ watch
  26. api ➞ Window ➞ crashReport

CSS

  1. css ➞ at-rules ➞ container ➞ scroll-state_queries ➞ scrolled
  2. css ➞ at-rules ➞ media ➞ scan
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ animation-trigger
  4. css ➞ properties ➞ animation-trigger ➞ none
  5. css ➞ properties ➞ background ➞ x-end
  6. css ➞ properties ➞ background ➞ x-start
  7. css ➞ properties ➞ background ➞ y-end
  8. css ➞ properties ➞ background ➞ y-start
  9. css ➞ properties ➞ background-position ➞ x-end
  10. css ➞ properties ➞ background-position ➞ x-start
  11. css ➞ properties ➞ background-position ➞ y-end
  12. css ➞ properties ➞ background-position ➞ y-start
  13. css ➞ properties ➞ background-position-x ➞ x-end
  14. css ➞ properties ➞ background-position-x ➞ x-start
  15. css ➞ properties ➞ background-position-y ➞ y-end
  16. css ➞ properties ➞ background-position-y ➞ y-start
  17. css ➞ properties ➞ mask ➞ x-end
  18. css ➞ properties ➞ mask ➞ x-start
  19. css ➞ properties ➞ mask ➞ y-end
  20. css ➞ properties ➞ mask ➞ y-start
  21. css ➞ properties ➞ mask-position ➞ x-end
  22. css ➞ properties ➞ mask-position ➞ x-start
  23. css ➞ properties ➞ mask-position ➞ y-end
  24. css ➞ properties ➞ mask-position ➞ y-start
  25. css ➞ properties ➞ object-position ➞ x-end
  26. css ➞ properties ➞ object-position ➞ x-start
  27. css ➞ properties ➞ object-position ➞ y-end
  28. css ➞ properties ➞ object-position ➞ y-start
  29. css ➞ properties ➞ offset ➞ x-end
  30. css ➞ properties ➞ offset ➞ x-start
  31. css ➞ properties ➞ offset ➞ y-end
  32. css ➞ properties ➞ offset ➞ y-start
  33. css ➞ properties ➞ offset-anchor ➞ x-end
  34. css ➞ properties ➞ offset-anchor ➞ x-start
  35. css ➞ properties ➞ offset-anchor ➞ y-end
  36. css ➞ properties ➞ offset-anchor ➞ y-start
  37. css ➞ properties ➞ offset-position ➞ x-end
  38. css ➞ properties ➞ offset-position ➞ x-start
  39. css ➞ properties ➞ offset-position ➞ y-end
  40. css ➞ properties ➞ offset-position ➞ y-start
  41. css ➞ properties ➞ overflow ➞ replaced_elements
  42. css ➞ properties ➞ overflow-x ➞ replaced_elements
  43. css ➞ properties ➞ overflow-y ➞ replaced_elements
  44. css ➞ properties ➞ perspective-origin ➞ x-end
  45. css ➞ properties ➞ perspective-origin ➞ x-start
  46. css ➞ properties ➞ perspective-origin ➞ y-end
  47. css ➞ properties ➞ perspective-origin ➞ y-start
  48. css ➞ properties ➞ timeline-trigger
  49. css ➞ properties ➞ timeline-trigger ➞ auto
  50. css ➞ properties ➞ timeline-trigger ➞ none
  51. css ➞ properties ➞ timeline-trigger ➞ normal
  52. css ➞ properties ➞ timeline-trigger-name
  53. css ➞ properties ➞ timeline-trigger-name ➞ none
  54. css ➞ properties ➞ timeline-trigger-source
  55. css ➞ properties ➞ timeline-trigger-source ➞ auto
  56. css ➞ properties ➞ timeline-trigger-source ➞ none
  57. css ➞ properties ➞ trigger-scope
  58. css ➞ properties ➞ trigger-scope ➞ all
  59. css ➞ properties ➞ trigger-scope ➞ none

HTML

  1. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist ➞ input_type_color
  2. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist ➞ input_type_date
  3. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist ➞ input_type_email
  4. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist ➞ input_type_number
  5. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist ➞ input_type_range
  6. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist ➞ input_type_search
  7. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist ➞ input_type_tel
  8. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist ➞ input_type_text
  9. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist ➞ input_type_time
  10. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist ➞ input_type_url
  11. html ➞ elements ➞ geolocation
  12. html ➞ elements ➞ geolocation ➞ autolocate
  13. html ➞ elements ➞ geolocation ➞ watch
  14. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_color ➞ list
  15. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_date ➞ list
  16. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_email ➞ list
  17. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_number ➞ list
  18. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_range ➞ list
  19. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_search ➞ list
  20. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_tel ➞ list
  21. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_text ➞ list
  22. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_time ➞ list
  23. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_url ➞ list

WEBDRIVER

  1. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ userAgentClientHints
  2. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ userAgentClientHints ➞ setClientHintsOverride
  3. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ userAgentClientHints ➞ setClientHintsOverride ➞ clientHints_parameter
  4. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ userAgentClientHints ➞ setClientHintsOverride ➞ contexts_parameter
  5. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ userAgentClientHints ➞ setClientHintsOverride ➞ userContexts_parameter

WEBEXTENSIONS

  1. webextensions ➞ api ➞ permissions ➞ Permissions ➞ data_collection

Removed entries (1)

The entries in this section were found in BCD on Friday, 6 February 2026, but are no longer present. The reasons for this removal can be anything from an experimental proposal that was never supported to a property or value being renamed to something else.

HTML

  1. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ list
  • Previous report: Monday, 9 February 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v7.3.1 (Friday, 6 February 2026) and v7.3.2 (Friday, 13 February 2026)

item.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon Feb 09 2026
item.description: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
item.content:encoded:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 2 February 2026 through Monday, 9 February 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +3, -0

Support increases (3)

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ columns ➞ column-height
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

JAVASCRIPT

  1. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ Iterator ➞ zip
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  2. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ Iterator ➞ zipKeyed
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 23

Show all 23 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (11)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Friday, 30 January 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

API

  1. api ➞ AudioParam ➞ exponentialRampToValueAtTime
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ AudioParam ➞ linearRampToValueAtTime
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

HTML

  1. html ➞ elements ➞ datalist
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ at-rules ➞ media ➞ color-gamut ➞ p3
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ at-rules ➞ media ➞ color-gamut ➞ rec2020
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ at-rules ➞ media ➞ color-gamut ➞ srgb
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. css ➞ types ➞ color ➞ system-color ➞ buttonborder
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  5. css ➞ types ➞ color ➞ system-color ➞ mark
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  6. css ➞ types ➞ color ➞ system-color ➞ marktext
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines

HTTP

  1. http ➞ headers ➞ Permissions-Policy ➞ ch-ua-high-entropy-values
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

WEBEXTENSIONS

  1. webextensions ➞ api ➞ runtime ➞ getVersion
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines

New entries (11)

The entries in this section were not found in BCD on Friday, 30 January 2026, but are now present. These usually do not have any support information attached to them, and often have no corresponding MDN page. Sometimes, entries that appear here also appear in the next section (“Removed BCD entries”) because of a Working Group deciding on a rename.

CSS

  1. css ➞ at-rules ➞ media ➞ color-gamut ➞ p3
  2. css ➞ at-rules ➞ media ➞ color-gamut ➞ rec2020
  3. css ➞ at-rules ➞ media ➞ color-gamut ➞ srgb
  4. css ➞ properties ➞ columns ➞ column-height
  5. css ➞ types ➞ color ➞ system-color ➞ buttonborder
  6. css ➞ types ➞ color ➞ system-color ➞ mark
  7. css ➞ types ➞ color ➞ system-color ➞ marktext

HTTP

  1. http ➞ headers ➞ Permissions-Policy ➞ ch-ua-high-entropy-values

JAVASCRIPT

  1. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ Iterator ➞ zip
  2. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ Iterator ➞ zipKeyed

WEBEXTENSIONS

  1. webextensions ➞ api ➞ runtime ➞ getVersion

Removed entries (1)

The entries in this section were found in BCD on Friday, 30 January 2026, but are no longer present. The reasons for this removal can be anything from an experimental proposal that was never supported to a property or value being renamed to something else.

CSS

  1. css ➞ types ➞ color ➞ system-color ➞ mark_marktext_buttonborder
  • Previous report: Monday, 2 February 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v7.3.0 (Friday, 30 January 2026) and v7.3.1 (Friday, 6 February 2026)

item.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon Feb 02 2026
item.description: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
item.content:encoded:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 26 January 2026 through Monday, 2 February 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +0, -0

BCD Metadata Changes: 7

Show all 7 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (3)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Friday, 23 January 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

API

  1. api ➞ GPUSupportedFeatures ➞ feature_subgroups ➞ subgroup_id_num_subgroups

  2. api ➞ RTCRtpSender ➞ setParameters ➞ parameters_degradationPreference_parameter ➞ maintain-framerate-and-resolution_value

New entries (4)

The entries in this section were not found in BCD on Friday, 23 January 2026, but are now present. These usually do not have any support information attached to them, and often have no corresponding MDN page. Sometimes, entries that appear here also appear in the next section (“Removed BCD entries”) because of a Working Group deciding on a rename.

API

  1. api ➞ GPUSupportedFeatures ➞ feature_subgroups ➞ subgroup_id_num_subgroups
  2. api ➞ RTCRtpSender ➞ setParameters ➞ parameters_degradationPreference_parameter ➞ maintain-framerate-and-resolution_value

Removed entries (0)

item.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon Jan 26 2026
item.description: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
item.content:encoded:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 19 January 2026 through Monday, 26 January 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +3, -0

Support increases (3)

API

  1. api ➞ ShadowRoot ➞ referenceTarget
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ types ➞ random
    Added to Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines

HTML

  1. html ➞ elements ➞ template ➞ shadowrootreferencetarget
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 38

Show all 38 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (25)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Thursday, 15 January 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

API

  1. api ➞ DocumentPictureInPicture
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ DocumentPictureInPicture ➞ enter_event
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines

    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines

    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines

    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines

    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ DocumentPictureInPictureEvent
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ DocumentPictureInPictureEvent ➞ window
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  9. api ➞ ShadowRoot ➞ getHTML ➞ escapes_lt_gt_in_attributes
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  10. api ➞ Window ➞ documentPictureInPicture
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  11. api ➞ Document ➞ requestStorageAccess ➞ strict_same_origin_policy
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ at-rules ➞ media ➞ display-mode ➞ picture-in-picture
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ font-variant-position
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ font-variant-position ➞ normal
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. css ➞ properties ➞ font-variant-position ➞ sub
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. css ➞ properties ➞ font-variant-position ➞ super
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  6. css ➞ at-rules ➞ media ➞ display-mode ➞ browser
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  7. css ➞ at-rules ➞ media ➞ display-mode ➞ fullscreen
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  8. css ➞ at-rules ➞ media ➞ display-mode ➞ minimal-ui
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  9. css ➞ at-rules ➞ media ➞ display-mode ➞ standalone
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  10. css ➞ at-rules ➞ media ➞ display-mode ➞ window-controls-overlay
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

HTML

    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines

The entries in this section were not found in BCD on Thursday, 15 January 2026, but are now present. These usually do not have any support information attached to them, and often have no corresponding MDN page. Sometimes, entries that appear here also appear in the next section (“Removed BCD entries”) because of a Working Group deciding on a rename.

item.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon Jan 19 2026
item.description: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
item.content:encoded:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 12 January 2026 through Monday, 19 January 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +59, -0

Support increases (59)

API

  1. api ➞ Element ➞ setHTML
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ HTMLElement ➞ focus ➞ options_focusVisible_parameter
    Added to Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ Location ➞ ancestorOrigins
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ NavigationHistoryEntry ➞ dispose_event
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ PerformancePaintTiming ➞ paintTime
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ PerformancePaintTiming ➞ presentationTime
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ Sanitizer ➞ Sanitizer
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ Sanitizer
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  9. api ➞ Sanitizer ➞ allowAttribute
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  10. api ➞ Sanitizer ➞ allowElement
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  11. api ➞ Sanitizer ➞ get
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  12. api ➞ Sanitizer ➞ removeAttribute
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  13. api ➞ Sanitizer ➞ removeElement
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  14. api ➞ Sanitizer ➞ removeUnsafe
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  15. api ➞ Sanitizer ➞ replaceElementWithChildren
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  16. api ➞ Sanitizer ➞ setComments
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  17. api ➞ Sanitizer ➞ setDataAttributes
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  18. api ➞ NavigationPrecommitController ➞ addHandler
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  19. api ➞ NavigationTransition ➞ to
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  20. api ➞ Origin ➞ Origin
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  21. api ➞ Origin
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  23. api ➞ Origin ➞ isSameOrigin
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  24. api ➞ Origin ➞ isSameSite
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  25. api ➞ Origin ➞ opaque
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  26. api ➞ PerformanceElementTiming ➞ paintTime
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  27. api ➞ PerformanceElementTiming ➞ presentationTime
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  28. api ➞ PerformanceLongAnimationFrameTiming ➞ paintTime
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  29. api ➞ PerformanceLongAnimationFrameTiming ➞ presentationTime
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  30. api ➞ PerformanceNavigationTiming ➞ confidence
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  31. api ➞ PerformanceTimingConfidence
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  32. api ➞ PerformanceTimingConfidence ➞ randomizedTriggerRate
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  33. api ➞ PerformanceTimingConfidence ➞ toJSON
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  34. api ➞ PerformanceTimingConfidence ➞ value
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  35. api ➞ VideoFrame ➞ metadata
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ overflow-clip-margin ➞ border-box
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ overflow-clip-margin ➞ content-box
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ overflow-clip-margin ➞ padding-box
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  4. css ➞ properties ➞ position-try-order
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. css ➞ properties ➞ position-try-order ➞ most-block-size
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  6. css ➞ properties ➞ position-try-order ➞ most-height
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  7. css ➞ properties ➞ position-try-order ➞ most-inline-size
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  8. css ➞ properties ➞ position-try-order ➞ most-width
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  9. css ➞ properties ➞ position-try-order ➞ normal
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  10. css ➞ properties ➞ text-justify ➞ auto
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  11. css ➞ properties ➞ text-justify ➞ inter-character
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  12. css ➞ properties ➞ text-justify ➞ inter-word
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  13. css ➞ properties ➞ text-justify ➞ none
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  14. css ➞ properties ➞ word-spacing ➞ percentages (⚠️ deprecated)
    Added to Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  15. css ➞ properties ➞ column-height
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  16. css ➞ properties ➞ column-height ➞ auto
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  17. css ➞ properties ➞ column-wrap
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  18. css ➞ properties ➞ column-wrap ➞ auto
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  19. css ➞ properties ➞ column-wrap ➞ nowrap
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

JAVASCRIPT

  1. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ Map ➞ getOrInsert
    Added to Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ Map ➞ getOrInsertComputed
    Added to Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ WeakMap ➞ getOrInsert
    Added to Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ WeakMap ➞ getOrInsertComputed
    Added to Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 74

Show all 74 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (28)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Tuesday, 6 January 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

API

  1. api ➞ DedicatedWorkerGlobalScope ➞ rtctransform_event
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ Document ➞ startViewTransition ➞ options_parameter
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ Document ➞ startViewTransition ➞ options_parameter ➞ types_parameter
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ PerformanceResourceTiming ➞ workerCacheLookupStart
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ PerformanceResourceTiming ➞ workerRouterEvaluationStart
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ at-rules ➞ font-face ➞ src ➞ format_keyword
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ position-try ➞ flip-x
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ position-try ➞ flip-y
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines

    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines

    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines

    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines

    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines

    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines

    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines

    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines

    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines

New entries (44)

The entries in this section were not found in BCD on Tuesday, 6 January 2026, but are now present. These usually do not have any support information attached to them, and often have no corresponding MDN page. Sometimes, entries that appear here also appear in the next section (“Removed BCD entries”) because of a Working Group deciding on a rename.

API

  1. api ➞ Document ➞ startViewTransition ➞ options_parameter

Removed entries (2)

The entries in this section were found in BCD on Tuesday, 6 January 2026, but are no longer present. The reasons for this removal can be anything from an experimental proposal that was never supported to a property or value being renamed to something else.
